chunks.text: Python is a programming language. Guido van Rossum released the first version in 1991. The language emphasizes readability.
JavaScript runs in browsers and on servers via Node.js. It is unrelated to Java despite the name.
Dense retrieval encodes chunks and queries into vectors. Similarity search finds nearest neighbors in embedding space.
BM25 is a sparse lexical ranking function. It scores query term frequency and document length.
RAG retrieves documents before generation. It reduces hallucinations when contexts are relevant.
